enabledDesc: When off, no custom CSS is injected in any conversation unless overridden per conversation.
sheetsDesc: Add one or more CSS blocks; enabled sheets are concatenated in list order. Open conversations need a refresh or re-enter to pick up changes.
sheetCssDesc: Inline CSS rules; @import is stripped before injection.
globalReloadHint: After editing styles, refresh the page or re-open conversations for changes to apply.
convEnabledDesc: Overrides the global master switch; Inherit follows plugin global settings.
convSheetsEmpty: No global style sheets. Add them under Settings → Plugins → Custom Styles.
convReloadHint: After saving, refresh the page or re-enter this conversation to apply styles.
